column3: Which course are you completing this survey for?
column16: When I struggle with a Chemistry concept, I can usually find a way to understand it.
column21: I believe I can improve my Chemistry skills with consistent effort.
column26: Mistakes in Chemistry are an important part of learning.
column31: I feel comfortable seeking help when I don’t understand a concept.
column36: I can motivate myself to keep studying even when the material is difficult.
column42: I believe intelligence and ability in Chemistry can be developed over time.
column47: I see challenges in Chemistry as opportunities to grow.
column52: I feel confident tackling new or unfamiliar Chemistry problems.
column57: When I don’t do well on an exam, I reflect and adjust my study strategies.
column62: I expect to feel more confident in Chemistry by the end of this quarter.
